agra.name: Agra
agra.description: Agra is one of India's most iconic tourist destinations, famous worldwide for the magnificent Taj Mahal, one of the Seven Wonders of the World.
agra.about_more: Located in Uttar Pradesh, Agra showcases the grandeur of Mughal architecture through forts, palaces, gardens, and ancient monuments.

attractions.name: Taj Mahal
attractions.desc: The world-famous marble monument built by Shah Jahan as a symbol of eternal love.

attractions.name: Agra Fort
attractions.desc: A UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring stunning Mughal palaces and royal halls.

attractions.name: Fatehpur Sikri
attractions.desc: An ancient Mughal city known for its red sandstone architecture and history.

luxury.name: The Oberoi Amarvilas
luxury.desc: Experience ultra-luxury rooms with direct Taj Mahal views and world-class hospitality.

luxury.name: ITC Mughal
luxury.desc: Mughal-style luxury resort with spa, gardens, and premium dining experience.

comfort.name: Tajview Agra
comfort.desc: Comfortable premium stay with beautiful Taj Mahal views and modern facilities.

comfort.name: Grand Mercure
comfort.desc: Stylish modern hotel offering rooftop pool, comfort, and great hospitality.

budget.name: Hotel Taj Sojourn
budget.desc: Affordable and clean stay near Taj Mahal with excellent hospitality.

budget.name: Hotel Amar
budget.desc: Budget-friendly hotel with comfortable rooms and excellent tourist location.

jaipur.name: Jaipur
jaipur.description: Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan, is one of the most iconic tourist destinations in India. Famous for its pink-colored buildings, it beautifully blends history, culture, architecture, and traditions.
jaipur.about_more: The city is home to magnificent attractions like Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jal Mahal, and Jantar Mantar. Jaipur is also known for traditional handicrafts, jewelry, and delicious Rajasthani cuisine.

attractions.name: Amber Fort
attractions.desc: A majestic fort showcasing Rajput architecture and panoramic city views.

attractions.name: Hawa Mahal
attractions.desc: Jaipur's iconic palace with beautiful windows and pink sandstone design.

attractions.name: City Palace
attractions.desc: A grand royal residence featuring museums, courtyards, and heritage art.

luxury.name: Rambagh Palace
luxury.desc: Royal palace hotel with luxurious rooms, heritage interiors, and premium hospitality.

luxury.name: Fairmont Jaipur
luxury.desc: Elegant luxury resort inspired by Mughal and Rajput architecture.

comfort.name: Holiday Inn Jaipur
comfort.desc: Comfortable modern stay with rooftop dining and swimming pool.

comfort.name: Lemon Tree Premier
comfort.desc: Stylish rooms with excellent comfort and great city connectivity.

budget.name: Hotel Pearl Palace
budget.desc: Budget-friendly hotel with traditional Rajasthani interiors and tasty food.

budget.name: Hotel Arya Niwas
budget.desc: Peaceful affordable stay with garden view and comfortable rooms.

kerala.name: Kerala
kerala.description: Kerala is a tropical paradise in Southern India, famous for its tranquil backwaters, palm-fringed beaches, ayurvedic health treatments, and scenic tea plantations in Munnar.
kerala.about_more: Nestled along the Malabar Coast, Kerala boasts rich culture, spectacular houseboats, spice-rich cuisine, and classical dance forms like Kathakali.

attractions.name: Alleppey Backwaters
attractions.desc: Spend a serene day on a traditional houseboat cruising past palm trees and villages.

attractions.name: Munnar Hills
attractions.desc: Lush tea gardens, rolling hills, and cool weather make this a beautiful hill station.

attractions.name: Kochi Fort
attractions.desc: Historic port city featuring Chinese fishing nets and Portuguese colonial architecture.

luxury.name: Kumarakom Lake Resort
luxury.desc: One of India's finest luxury heritage resorts, situated on Lake Vembanad.

luxury.name: The Raviz Kovalam
luxury.desc: Cliff top luxury resort with unmatched panoramic views of the Kovalam coastline.

comfort.name: Scenic Munnar Resort
comfort.desc: Beautiful valley views with premium rooms, pool, and guided tea walks.

comfort.name: Kochi Marriott Hotel
comfort.desc: Contemporary comfort located next to Lulu Mall, offering premium dining and pool.

budget.name: Zostel Alleppey
budget.desc: Charming backpackers hostel right next to the beach, offering backwater tours.

budget.name: Old Harbour Hotel
budget.desc: Historical building restored as a boutique budget lodge in Fort Kochi.

goa.name: Goa
goa.description: Goa is India's premier beach destination, known for its scenic sandy shores, vibrant nightlife, historical churches, water sports, and delicious seafood.
goa.about_more: With a unique Portuguese heritage, Goa features spectacular historic churches like the Bom Jesus Basilica alongside scenic locations like Baga and Calangute.

attractions.name: Baga Beach
attractions.desc: Famous for nightlife, beach shacks, music parties, and exciting water sports.

attractions.name: Dudhsagar Falls
attractions.desc: One of India's tallest waterfalls surrounded by lush forests and scenic beauty.

attractions.name: Bom Jesus Basilica
attractions.desc: A UNESCO World Heritage church showcasing Portuguese architecture and rich history.

luxury.name: Taj Exotica Resort & Spa
luxury.desc: Premium beachfront luxury resort with spa, private beach, and world-class hospitality.

luxury.name: W Goa
luxury.desc: Stylish luxury resort near Vagator Beach with infinity pool and sea-view rooms.

comfort.name: Country Inn & Suites
comfort.desc: Comfortable rooms with pool, modern interiors, and easy beach access.

comfort.name: Lemon Tree Amarante
comfort.desc: Elegant stay with modern facilities, restaurant, and peaceful atmosphere.

budget.name: Zostel Goa
budget.desc: Popular affordable hostel with vibrant atmosphere and beach vibes.

budget.name: Hotel Bonanza
budget.desc: Budget-friendly stay with clean rooms and quick access to beaches.

kashmir.name: Kashmir
kashmir.description: Kashmir is famous worldwide for its breathtaking snow-capped mountains, pristine lakes (like Dal Lake), colorful tulip gardens, and houseboats.
kashmir.about_more: Often called "Paradise on Earth", Kashmir offers a scenic escape with spectacular valleys like Gulmarg and Pahalgam, rich handicrafts, and saffron fields.

attractions.name: Dal Lake
attractions.desc: Famous for its wooden houseboats and floating shikara boat rides.

attractions.name: Gulmarg Valley
attractions.desc: A gorgeous meadow known for winter skiing and the high-altitude cable car ride.

attractions.name: Pahalgam
attractions.desc: Lush pine forests, Lidder River, and stunning valleys perfect for trekking.

luxury.name: The Khyber Resort & Spa
luxury.desc: World-class luxury ski resort nestled in pine forests with mountain views.

luxury.name: Taj Lake Palace Srinagar
luxury.desc: Premium luxury stay offering iconic views of the Dal Lake and mountains.

comfort.name: Grand Mumtaz Resort
comfort.desc: Comfortable premium hotel overlooking the scenic Lidder River.

comfort.name: Hotel Heevan
comfort.desc: Beautiful traditional architecture with modern facilities and cozy rooms.

budget.name: Zostel Srinagar
budget.desc: Vibrant garden hostel with comfortable bunks and highly budget-friendly rates.

budget.name: Hotel Hilltop
budget.desc: Warm and clean budget accommodation close to the gondola ride point.

varanasi.name: Varanasi
varanasi.description: Varanasi, one of the world's oldest continually inhabited cities, is the spiritual capital of India. It is famous for its holy ghats along the River Ganges.
varanasi.about_more: Steeped in Hindu mythology and history, Varanasi is renowned for the mesmerizing evening Ganga Aarti, historic temples, and traditional silk weavers.

attractions.name: Dashashwamedh Ghat
attractions.desc: The primary and busiest ghat, famous for the grand daily evening Ganga Aarti ceremony.

attractions.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
attractions.desc: One of the most sacred Hindu temples dedicated to Shiva, featuring gold plated spires.

attractions.name: Sarnath
attractions.desc: Located nearby, this is the historic site where Lord Buddha gave his first sermon.

luxury.name: Taj Nadesar Palace
luxury.desc: Magnificent heritage palace set amidst gardens, offering royal horse-drawn carriage rides.

luxury.name: BrijRama Palace
luxury.desc: Heritage boutique palace hotel situated right on the banks of River Ganges.

comfort.name: Radisson Hotel Varanasi
comfort.desc: Modern international standard hotel offering quality dining and comfortable rooms.

comfort.name: The Gateway Hotel
comfort.desc: Premium hotel surrounded by 40 acres of gardens, offering calm and comfort.

budget.name: Zostel Varanasi
budget.desc: Vibrant and clean backpacker hostel within walking distance to key ghats.

budget.name: Alka Hotel
budget.desc: Cozy budget hotel overlooking the Ganges with a popular vegetarian rooftop cafe.
